summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on a sandbox Docker backend refactor in the moltis repo, specifically introducing a BackendKind enum and improving documentation wording.
summary.outcome: Both PR comments addressed: BackendKind enum introduced to replace string comparisons on `cli`, doc wording fixed for Podman sysfs paths. All 29 tests pass, clippy clean, changes committed and pushed.

repo: CLAUDE.md enforces a 'match on types, never strings' rule — string comparisons on backend identifiers like 'cli' are a code smell flagged in review.
Sandbox backend code lives in crates/tools/src/sandbox/docker.rs with tests split across tests/core.rs and tests.rs.
Tests use `use super::docker::*` glob import, making pub(crate) types from docker.rs accessible without explicit re-export.
Greptile is used as an automated PR reviewer in this repo.

code.finding: BackendKind enum introduced to replace &str comparisons; hardening_args function signature updated to accept BackendKind instead of &str; resolve_host_gateway updated to match on BackendKind.
Tests updated to use BackendKind enum variants instead of string literals for backend type identification.
Documentation updated to be precise about which sysfs paths remain unmasked on Podman backend.

workflow: Worktrees are used for parallel development; the active worktree was at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/astonishing-sunspot.
Dolt remote may not be configured in worktrees — this is expected and non-blocking.
Standard pre-push checklist: cargo test, cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy.

friction: Locating the test file required multiple probing steps (Grep for mod tests, reading mod.rs, listing directory, checking tests.rs) because the test layout was non-obvious — tests lived in both tests/core.rs and a sibling tests.rs.
